calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Reset From Nov-15-18 To Dec-27-18 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, August 12, 2015, in Department 525:
Susie Johnson, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Jaime Juarez, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Susie Johnson testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

Defendant/Appellant, Jaime Juarez testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Not Marked - 3 pages of time sheets/invoices and picture of painted house in cell phone.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Unmarked evidence returned to Mr. Juarez in the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Judgment Entered
